title: QCBM
description: Quantum Circuit Born Machine (QCBM) learns discrete probability distributions (2×2 Bars and Stripes) by minimizing KL divergence via the Parameter Shift Rule.

params.name: n
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 4，范围在2到8之间

params.help: Number of parameterized layers in the variational quantum circuit.
params.name: layers
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 4，范围在1到10之间

params.name: epochs
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 40，范围在1到200之间

params.help: Positive Adam optimizer learning rate. Typical range: 0.01 to 0.3.
params.name: lr
params.info: 请输入正数学习率，典型范围0.01到0.3（如 0.1）
